top_signals.title: Traders Are Most Positive on Dollar Since 2015 as Fed Hike Looms
top_signals.summary: Global traders have turned the most positive on the outlook for the dollar since 2015 as bets that borrowing costs will remain elevated for longer have fueled a monthlong rally in the US currency.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: ETF IQ 7/6/2026
top_signals.summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: State Street Investment Management Chief Business Officer Anna Paglia, Heft ETF Co-Portfolio Manager Neil Howe, and  E Fund Management Assistant head of Global Index Sylvia Zhang. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
